title: SelectionPolicy / PolicyRef
description: A reified, content-addressed, total, non-learned, cost-based selection policy and the lightweight PolicyRef that records its use (RFC-0005). One mechanism serves two sites: swap-target selection (RFC-0002) and packing-schedule selection (RFC-0004). The policy is a total decision-table predicate from inspectable Meta to a finite candidate set with an explicit cost function; it is NOT Turing-complete (the expressiveness ceiling is the feature, ADR-006). Every automatic selection emits a mandatory EXPLAIN record.

x-mycelium.$comment: RFC-0005 fixes the policy's required PROPERTIES (total, finite candidate set, deterministic, explicit cost, mandatory EXPLAIN, override hook) but defers the concrete predicate grammar to a later RFC (OQ-5). This schema fixes the contract surface and the EXPLAIN-trace shape; the predicate body is left as an opaque-but-declared `rule` object pending that RFC. Determinism (same Meta in -> same choice out) is a behavioural contract, not single-instance checkable.

PolicyRef.description: The content hash of a SelectionPolicy, recorded in Meta.policy_used whenever a Swap or packing decision uses it (RFC-0005 §3).

ExplainTrace.description: The mandatory EXPLAIN record emitted by every automatic selection (RFC-0005 §2.2).

inputs_considered.description: The inspectable Meta fields the policy read (bounds, dtype, sparsity class).

override.description: A deterministic user override/hint, if one forced the choice.

candidates.description: The FINITE candidate set the policy chooses among (RFC-0005 §2.1).

cost_function.description: An identifier/spec of the explicit cost function. Mycelium's statistics are exact metadata, not sampled estimates, so the cardinality-estimation opacity of DB optimizers does not arise (RFC-0005 §2.5).

rules.description: The total decision table: each rule maps an inspectable-input predicate to a candidate. Concrete predicate grammar deferred (OQ-5); kept as a declared object here.

when.description: Predicate over queryable Meta (grammar in a later RFC).

explainable.description: EXPLAIN is mandatory; a policy that cannot explain is the black box ADR-006 forbids.

explain_trace_shape.description: Optional embedded example/shape of the EXPLAIN record this policy emits.
